metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Name of the workload resource group to create (SQL, storage, identity). Use any name allowed by Azure.
Name of the NETWORKING resource group to create (spoke VNet, private endpoints, gateway VM). Hub-spoke: hub + peering are out of scope.
Name of the operational SQL logical server (Mirroring source). Globally unique; lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Default is collision-safe - replace with your own name if you prefer.
Operational database name (Mirroring source).
Name of the ETL SQL logical server (Copy Job source). Globally unique; lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Default is collision-safe - replace with your own name if you prefer.
ETL database name (Copy Job source).
Storage account name (Shortcut source). Globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumerics. Default is collision-safe - replace with your own name if you prefer.
Blob container that holds the Shortcut reference files.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity that acts as the SQL Entra admin and runs the seed script. Default is collision-safe.
Automatically seed the SQL databases and upload the Shortcut file as part of the deployment (runs a deployment script). Set false to seed later with scripts/Seed-Data.ps1.
Base raw URL the automated seed step downloads seed files from (data/sql/*.sql, data/blob/reference/regions/regions.csv).
Unique token that forces the seed deployment script to re-run on each deployment.
SQL administrator login. Local auth is DISABLED (Entra-only); kept only for ARM API compatibility.
SQL administrator password. Never used (Entra-only auth); has a generated default so no input is required. Kept for ARM API compatibility.
Object id of the deploying user (your Entra objectId) to grant db_owner on both databases. Empty to skip the grant.
UPN / login of the deploying user, used for the db_owner grant. Empty to skip the grant.
Name of the spoke virtual network to create in the networking RG.
Address space for the spoke VNet.
Subnet prefix for the SQL private endpoints.
Subnet prefix for the VNet data gateway VM.
Name of the private endpoint for the operational SQL server.
Name of the private endpoint for the ETL SQL server.
Name of the VNet data gateway VM.
Gateway VM size.
Gateway VM administrator username.
Gateway VM administrator password. Generated default so no input is required; reset in the portal to RDP and install the data gateway.
Your public IP, allowed to RDP (3389) to the gateway VM. Empty = no inbound RDP rule (use Bastion / add later).
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Resource id of the managed identity.
Principal (object) id - used as the SQL Entra admin sid.
Client id of the managed identity.
Name of the managed identity - used as the SQL Entra admin login.
Logical SQL server name. Must be globally unique.
Database name to create on the server.
Azure region.
SQL administrator login. Local auth is DISABLED (Entra-only) but a login is kept for API compatibility.
SQL administrator password. Never used - local auth is disabled - but kept for API compatibility.
Microsoft Entra admin object id (sid) for the server. Required (Entra-only auth).
Microsoft Entra admin login / display name.
Entra principal type of the admin: User, Group, or Application (managed identity = Application).
SKU name for the database (e.g. GP_S_Gen5_2 serverless, or S0).
SKU tier for the database.
Resource tags.
SQL server resource id (used to create the private endpoint).
SQL server resource name.
Fully qualified domain name of the SQL server.
Database name.
System-assigned managed identity principal id of the server.
Storage account name. Must be globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric chars.
Azure region for the storage account.
Blob container that holds the shortcut source files.
Resource tags applied to every resource.
Storage account resource name.
DFS (ADLS Gen2) endpoint used when creating the OneLake shortcut.
Blob endpoint.
Container that holds the shortcut source files.
Logical SQL server name. Must be globally unique.
Database name to create on the server.
Azure region.
SQL administrator login. Local auth is DISABLED (Entra-only) but a login is kept for API compatibility.
SQL administrator password. Never used - local auth is disabled - but kept for API compatibility.
Microsoft Entra admin object id (sid) for the server. Required (Entra-only auth).
Microsoft Entra admin login / display name.
Entra principal type of the admin: User, Group, or Application (managed identity = Application).
SKU name for the database (e.g. GP_S_Gen5_2 serverless, or S0).
SKU tier for the database.
Resource tags.
SQL server resource id (used to create the private endpoint).
SQL server resource name.
Fully qualified domain name of the SQL server.
Database name.
System-assigned managed identity principal id of the server.
Name of the spoke virtual network.
Azure region.
Address space for the spoke VNet.
Subnet for the SQL private endpoints.
Subnet for the VNet data gateway VM.
Resource tags.
Resource id of the spoke VNet.
Resource id of the private-endpoint subnet.
Resource id of the gateway VM subnet.
Resource id of the SQL private DNS zone.
Name of the private endpoint.
Azure region.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Resource id of the target Azure SQL logical server.
Resource id of the SQL private DNS zone (privatelink.database.windows.net).
Resource tags.
Resource id of the private endpoint.
Name of the private endpoint.
Azure region.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Resource id of the target Azure SQL logical server.
Resource id of the SQL private DNS zone (privatelink.database.windows.net).
Resource tags.
Resource id of the private endpoint.
Name of the gateway VM.
Azure region.
Resource id of the gateway subnet.
Resource id of the user-assigned managed identity (the SQL Entra admin).
Client id of the user-assigned managed identity (for the seed login).
VM administrator username.
VM administrator password. Generated default so no input is required; reset in the portal if you need to RDP.
VM size.
Public IP to allow RDP (3389) from. Empty = no inbound RDP rule (use Bastion / add later).
Run the seed Custom Script Extension.
Workload resource group that holds the seed storage account (for the account key).
Storage account holding the Shortcut source files.
Shortcut blob container.
FQDN of the operational SQL server.
Operational database name.
FQDN of the ETL SQL server.
ETL database name.
Object id of the deploying user to grant db_owner. Empty to skip.
UPN of the deploying user to grant db_owner. Empty to skip.
Base raw URL to download the seed files + bootstrap script from.
Token that forces the seed extension to re-run on each deployment.
Resource tags.

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [format('powershell -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -NoProfile -File vm-seed.ps1 -UamiClientId "{0}" -OpsFqdn "{1}" -OpsDb "{2}" -EtlFqdn "{3}" -EtlDb "{4}" -GrantObjectId "{5}" -GrantUpn "{6}" -StorageAccount "{7}" -StorageKey "{8}" -Container "{9}" -SeedBaseUrl "{10}"', parameters('uamiClientId'), parameters('opsSqlServerFqdn'), parameters('opsDatabaseName'), parameters('etlSqlServerFqdn'), parameters('etlDatabaseName'), parameters('grantObjectId'), parameters('grantLogin'), parameters('storageAccountName'), listKeys(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('storageResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value, parameters('containerName'), parameters('seedSourceUrl'))]

metadata.description: Gateway VM resource name.
Public IP address of the gateway VM (for RDP / gateway install).
Private IP of the gateway VM NIC.
